title: DeathLogger
description: A plugin to store informations about your players when they die, such as their inventory, death cause and location.
body:
This very simple plugin allows you to log many informations about players when they die, such as their location, inventory, or death message.

See the gallery for a few examples.

# Features

- Logging death location, time, message, and player
- JSON Storage
- Easy refunding
- GUI navigation

# Requirements

- [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net) (or any permission plugin)
- [NexusCore](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nexuscore)

# Commands and permissions
See all the permissions and commands from the plugin in the [docs](https://docs.nexusdev.cc/deathlogger/perms-commands)
